bodyText:
What is business valuation services? IBBI-compliant business valuation using DCF, market approach, NAV. For M&A, fundraising, tax compliance, FEMA, IBC.
Business Valuation Services is a professional service offered by Virtual Auditor, an AI-powered CA and IBBI Registered Valuer firm (IBBI/RV/03/2019/12333) led by CA V. Viswanathan (FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV), serving clients in Salem, Tamil Nadu since 2012.
Quick Answer: Business Valuation in Salem — IBBI-compliant business valuation using DCF, market approach, NAV. For M&A, fundraising, tax complia. From ₹50,000. Contact +91 99622 60333.

HEADING2: Business Valuation Services in Salem
Virtual Auditor provides business valuation services in Salem, Tamil Nadu. Steel City of Tamil Nadu. Our multi-credential practice (FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV) ensures comprehensive professional service delivery.
ROC jurisdiction: ROC Chennai. Pincode: 636001.

HEADING2: Our Service Scope
• DCF Valuation (Discounted Cash Flow)
• Comparable Company Analysis
• NAV (Net Asset Value) Method
• FEMA/FDI Valuation (Rule 11UA)
• ESOP Valuation (Ind AS 102)
• 409A Valuation
• IBC Valuation (Reg. 35)
• Fairness Opinion

HEADING2: Why Virtual Auditor for Salem

HEADING2: Frequently Asked Questions

faqs.q: What is an IBBI Registered Valuer?
faqs.a: A professional registered with IBBI under the Registered Valuers Regulations, 2017. Required for valuations under Companies Act and IBC.

faqs.q: How many valuation methods do you use?
faqs.a: We use up to 18 methods with 10,000 Monte Carlo simulations per engagement for statistically defensible results.

faqs.q: How long does a valuation report take?
faqs.a: Standard reports in 7-10 working days. Complex multi-framework valuations may take 15-20 days.

faqs.q: Do you provide business valuation in Salem?
faqs.a: Yes. Virtual Auditor serves clients in Salem, Tamil Nadu. Steel City of Tamil Nadu. Contact +91 99622 60333 for a free consultation.

faqs.q: What is the nearest Virtual Auditor office to Salem?
faqs.a: Our nearest office depends on your location. Chennai (HQ): Spencer Plaza, Anna Salai. Bangalore: MG Road. Mumbai: Goregaon West. All services available remotely for Salem clients.

faqs.q: How do I get started with business valuation in Salem?
faqs.a: Call +91 99622 60333 or WhatsApp us. Free 30-minute consultation. We handle the complete process for Salem businesses with no location surcharges.
